content.services_summary: ATA Medical Camden offers comprehensive travel vaccinations with same-day appointments across 3 Singapore locations (Tanjong Pagar, Orchard, Jurong East). They are MOH-licensed to administer Yellow Fever vaccines and provide Hajj/Umrah vaccinations, Meningitis ACWY, and 20+ other travel vaccines including Hepatitis A/B, Typhoid, Japanese Encephalitis, and Rabies. They also offer doctor-curated Travel Medicine Kits and instant booking confirmation.
certifications: Ministry of Health (MOH) licensed for Yellow Fever vaccination
content.highlight: MOH-licensed yellow fever centre, same-day travel vaccinations

clinics.address: 21 Jurong Gateway Rd, #02-08 CPF Jurong Building

content.services_summary: ATA Medical Clinic offers comprehensive vaccination services for routine and travel needs. Travel vaccinations are available alongside routine immunizations, though specific vaccine types and pre-travel consultation details are not detailed on the website.
content.highlight: MOH-licensed clinic with travel vaccinations available

vaccines.notes: NETT when booked via app/portal. Source: Supabase verified
NETT incl GST. Source: Supabase verified

content.services_summary: ATA Medical offers comprehensive travel vaccination services at three Singapore locations with same-day appointments and walk-in availability. They administer 20+ vaccines including yellow fever, hepatitis A/B, typhoid, Japanese encephalitis, meningitis, and Hajj/Umrah vaccines, plus curated travel medicine kits. MOH-licensed yellow fever vaccination centre with vaccinations recorded on the National Immunisation Registry.
content.highlight: MOH-licensed yellow fever centre, same-day travel vaccines

content.services_summary: CGH's Medical Centre for Travellers (MCT) is a dedicated travel medicine service at Changi General Hospital, staffed by infectious disease specialists experienced in travel health. Pre-travel services include hepatitis A/B, typhoid, meningococcal ACWY, influenza, tetanus/diphtheria, rabies, Japanese encephalitis, and yellow fever vaccinations, with nurse or doctor consultations available. Post-travel services cover fever assessment, tropical disease screening, rashes, diarrhoea, jaundice, STI screening, and long-term returnee medicals — making it one of Singapore's most complete travel medicine centres.
content.consult_note: Nurse or doctor consultation available — appointment basis
content.highlight: Full-service travel & tropical medicine, Changi Hospital

content.services_summary: MOH-licensed travel clinic offering comprehensive vaccination services including yellow fever with official certification, malaria prophylaxis, and vaccines for hepatitis A/B, typhoid, meningococcal, MMR, varicella, and more. Pre-travel consultations available to customize vaccination plans based on destination, trip duration, and health history.
certifications: Yellow Fever vaccination with official certification
content.consult_note: Customised vaccination plan available by appointment; consultation required to discuss vaccine combinations and timing based on individual travel details.
content.highlight: MOH-licensed travel clinic, yellow fever certified

content.services_summary: Clari Health CBD is Singapore's only dedicated private travel health specialist clinic, offering the full range of pre-travel vaccinations including MOH-licensed yellow fever (ICVP/yellow card). Located in the CBD at International Plaza, the clinic sees same-day appointments with minimal wait times, making it ideal for business travellers and last-minute bookings. Pre-travel consultations are conducted by travel medicine specialists.
content.highlight: Singapore's only private travel health specialist

clinics.address: 21 Jurong Gateway Rd, #04-03 CPF Jurong Building

vaccines.notes: Incl GST. Nett when booked via Minmed app

content.services_summary: Minmed offers travel vaccinations including Yellow Fever, Hepatitis A & B, Typhoid, and other routine immunisations. Services are available at multiple clinic locations with online appointment booking and same-day or next-day results for health screening.
content.highlight: Travel vaccinations including Yellow Fever available

vaccines.notes: Incl GST. Nett when booked via Minmed app

content.services_summary: Minmed Paragon offers comprehensive travel vaccination services including Yellow Fever (with ICVP), Hepatitis A/B, Typhoid, Japanese Encephalitis, Rabies, Meningococcal, and routine travel vaccines. Pre-travel health assessments are conducted by experienced travel health specialists to create personalized vaccination plans based on destination, duration, and activities. Services are available across multiple Singapore locations with flexible hours and soft/physical immunisation certificates provided.
certifications: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis (ICVP)
content.consult_note: Pre-travel consultation included — healthcare professionals assess individual needs based on destination, duration, activities, and vaccination status to create personalized vaccination plans.
content.highlight: Yellow Fever & travel vaccinations with ICVP certificates

vaccines.notes: Incl GST. Nett when booked via Minmed app

Pre-travel consultation appears to be available through their GP services, though specific travel medicine consultation details are not explicitly detailed on the homepage.
content.highlight: Travel vaccinations including Yellow Fever available

vaccines.notes: Incl GST. Nett when booked via Minmed app

content.services_summary: Minmed Clinic Waterway Point offers vaccination services as part of their general GP clinic offerings, including childhood vaccinations and health screening. While travel medicine is not explicitly detailed, vaccinations are available through their network of clinics, though specific travel vaccine types are not mentioned.
content.highlight: General GP clinic with vaccination services available

vaccines.notes: Incl GST. Nett when booked via Minmed app

content.services_summary: Minmed offers travel vaccinations including Yellow Fever, Hepatitis A & B, Typhoid, and other routine vaccines. Services are available at multiple clinic locations with online appointment booking and teleconsultation options. Pre-travel health screening and medical consultations are available to support travel preparation.
content.highlight: Travel vaccinations including yellow fever at multiple locations

content.services_summary: Nuffield Medical Siglap offers comprehensive travel vaccination services including hepatitis A/B, typhoid, yellow fever, Japanese encephalitis, meningitis, malaria prophylaxis, and routine immunisations. They provide pre-travel health counselling, same-day vaccinations, and issue WHO-recognised International Certificates of Vaccination. The clinic recommends consultation 4-6 weeks before departure to assess individual vaccination requirements.
certifications: WHO International Certificate of Vaccination issuer
content.consult_note: Pre-travel counselling is included; doctors recommend consultation at least 4-6 weeks before departure
content.highlight: MOH-licensed yellow fever vaccination centre

clinics.address: 328 North Bridge Rd, #02-27 Raffles Hotel Arcade

content.services_summary: Osler Health offers comprehensive travel medicine services including pre-travel health consultations, all major travel vaccinations (yellow fever, typhoid, Japanese encephalitis, rabies, hepatitis A/B, malaria prophylaxis, and others), and curated travel medicine packs for common ailments. Appointments are recommended six weeks before departure, with all vaccination records available via the myOslerHealth app. They are a designated MOH testing clinic providing COVID-19 pre-departure testing.
content.consult_note: Pre-travel consultation recommended six weeks before departure; consultation required to obtain travel medicine pack
content.highlight: MOH-designated travel clinic with full vaccination suite

clinics.address: 4190 Ang Mo Kio Ave 6, #03-01 Broadway Plaza

content.highlight: Travel vaccinations at subsidised rates, 38 clinics

content.services_summary: Parkway Shenton HarbourFront offers a wide range of adult, children, and travel vaccinations at subsidised rates. Travel vaccinations are available across their 38+ clinics islandwide, integrated with GP services for common illnesses and medical examinations.
content.highlight: Travel vaccinations at subsidised rates islandwide

content.services_summary: Parkway Shenton offers a comprehensive range of travel vaccinations at subsidized rates for Singaporeans and Permanent Residents under the National Adult Immunisation Schedule. They provide common travel vaccines including COVID-19, Hepatitis A & B, Japanese encephalitis, Meningococcal, Rabies, Typhoid, Yellow fever, and Tetanus at multiple vaccination clinics across Singapore.
content.highlight: Travel vaccinations at subsidised rates, walk-in clinics

The clinic provides a range of travel vaccines but does not specify pre-travel consultation details or yellow fever certification on their homepage.

content.services_summary: Raffles Medical offers primary care services including teleconsultation and health screening through its network of over 100 clinics and a hospital in Singapore. While travel medicine is not explicitly detailed on the homepage, primary care and family medicine services are available that typically include pre-travel health assessments.
certifications: MOH certified (Raffles Hospital for acute trauma care)
content.highlight: Large private healthcare network with primary care services

vaccines.notes: Yellow fever at selected locations only

content.services_summary: No specific travel medicine or vaccination services are mentioned on the website. Raffles Medical MBFC offers general primary care and family medicine services, but travel-specific offerings such as pre-travel vaccinations, yellow fever immunization, or travel health consultations are not detailed in the available content.
certifications: MOH certified (Raffles Hospital for acute trauma care)
content.highlight: General healthcare provider; travel services not specified

content.services_summary: SGH Travel Clinic is a dedicated travel medicine service at Singapore General Hospital, operated by infectious disease and travel medicine specialists. The clinic offers comprehensive pre-travel health assessments, the full range of travel vaccinations including yellow fever (ICVP), and post-travel consultations for returning patients with illness. As one of Singapore's oldest public hospital travel clinics, SGH serves both individual travellers and occupational health referrals requiring specialist-level travel medicine advice.
content.consult_note: Specialist travel medicine consultation — appointment recommended
content.highlight: Specialist ID-run travel clinic, Singapore General Hospital

content.services_summary: Singapore Women's Clinic offers routine, seasonal, and travel vaccinations as part of their comprehensive preventive health services. While travel vaccinations are listed among their offerings, specific vaccine types and pre-travel consultation details are not detailed on their website.
content.highlight: MOH-registered women's clinic with travel vaccinations

vaccines.notes: Public hospital rate. Source: Supabase admin-edited

content.services_summary: TTSH's Travellers' Health and Vaccination Clinic (THVC) is run by the Department of Infectious Diseases — Singapore's foremost authority on travel medicine. Specialist infectious disease doctors and nurses provide personalised pre-travel consultations covering destination-specific risk assessment, vaccination history review, immunity blood testing, and anti-malarial prophylaxis. Vaccines include yellow fever, typhoid, Japanese encephalitis, hepatitis A/B, meningococcal, and rabies. Post-travel fever and tropical illness care also available.
content.highlight: Infectious Disease-led travel clinic, Tan Tock Seng Hospital

content.services_summary: Urgent Care Clinic International is an ISTM (International Society of Travel Medicine) member clinic located at the Novotel Singapore on Kitchener Road. The clinic offers walk-in yellow fever vaccinations (Stamaril) and rabies vaccinations (Rabipur), alongside urgent care consultations, specialist referrals, and on-site diagnostics. Its hotel location and walk-in policy make it a convenient option for travellers requiring travel vaccinations with no prior appointment.
content.highlight: ISTM-certified travel clinic, walk-in yellow fever & rabies

content.services_summary: Unihealth 24-HR Clinic at Jurong East is a round-the-clock general practice clinic offering walk-in vaccinations for adults and children at any hour. Available vaccines include influenza, hepatitis B, MMR, Tdap, varicella, pneumococcal, and HPV. While not a dedicated travel medicine clinic, the 24-hour availability makes it convenient for working adults needing routine travel vaccines outside normal hours.
content.highlight: 24-hour walk-in vaccinations, Jurong East

content.services_summary: Unihealth 24HR Clinic offers COVID-19 Pfizer booster shots free under the National Vaccination Programme, plus general preventive medicine and health screenings. While not explicitly marketed as a travel medicine specialist, the clinic provides 24/7 primary healthcare services that may include travel-related vaccinations as part of their comprehensive preventive care offerings.
certifications: Diploma in Aesthetic Medicine from Aesthetic Medicine Academy in America
content.highlight: 24/7 clinic with preventive medicine services

content.services_summary: Woodlands Hospital Vaccination & Travel Clinic offers comprehensive pre-travel and post-travel health services including specialist doctor consultations, a full range of travel and routine vaccinations (yellow fever, meningococcal, rabies, Japanese encephalitis, etc.), country-specific health risk assessments, travel-related illness prevention and treatment, post-travel infection management, and animal bite treatment. They are MOH-licensed to administer yellow fever vaccinations and provide official certification.
certifications: MOH licensed for Yellow Fever vaccination
content.consult_note: Specialist doctor consultation included; covers medical history review, vaccination education, side effects counselling, and travel advice. Recommended to visit 2 weeks before travel (4-6 weeks for multi-dose vaccines like rabies).
content.highlight: MOH-licensed yellow fever centre, specialist travel clinic
